content:
📜 5. Familiars – Personal Companions That Provide Weekly Buffs

📜 Every archetype chooses a familiar that grants them minor advantages.

✔ How Familiars Work:
• Each student selects a familiar companion at the start of the game.
• The familiar provides a small, recurring buff.
• Some familiars may evolve or change based on class progress.

✔ Example Familiars & Buffs:
• The Raven (Symbol of Knowledge) → +1 to all perception skill checks.
• The Serpent (Symbol of Deception) → Gains one reroll on persuasion-based actions.
• The Wolf (Symbol of Loyalty & Pack Strength) → Gains extra defense when working in a faction.
• The Owl (Symbol of Wisdom & Fate) → Can predict the Fate Wheel result once per game.
• The Cat (Symbol of Chaos & Luck) → Has a small chance to avoid negative effects.

📜 Why This Works:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 513 (chunk 513/555)
